task_name: Put my watch on the dresser and grab my laptop so I don’t forget it.
instruction: I am heading out to work. Could you do me a quick favor? Grab my watch from the side table and set it on the dresser, then bring my laptop along so I do not forget it.
target_description: I am heading out to work. Could you do me a quick favor? Grab my watch from the side table and set it on the dresser, then bring my laptop along so I do not forget it.
